name: Tyrande
description: A Healer who helps her allies lockdown and finish off enemies.
title: High Priestess of Elune
info: Tyrande Whisperwind strikes fear into all who wish ill of the Kaldorei. As the highest ranking Sentinel and High Priestess of Elune, she is not only the night elves' most deadly warrior, but also their most cunning leader.

Tyrande.name: Light of Elune
Tyrande.description: Heal an ally Hero for 270 (+4% per level). Light of Elune's cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds every time Tyrande hits an enemy with a Basic Attack or damages an enemy Hero.  Stores up to 2 charges. Cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.

Tyrande.name: Sentinel
Tyrande.description: Send an Owl across the battleground revealing its path, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage to the first Hero hit, and revealing them for 5 seconds. If a Hero revealed by Sentinel dies, refresh its cooldown.

Tyrande.name: Lunar Flare
Tyrande.description: After 0.75 seconds, deal 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stun enemies in the target area for 0.75 seconds. Restores 25 Mana per enemy hit.  Quest: Hitting a Hero with Lunar Flare increases its damage by 3%, up to 120%. Double this bonus if the Hero dies within 3 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 10 Heroes, increase Lunar Flare's range by 30%.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Sentinel now pierces the first Hero hit.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Every 8th Basic Attacks fires a Lunar Flare, prioritizing Heroes. Attack Range increased by 1.

Tyrande.name: Shadowstalk
Tyrande.description: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

Tyrande.name: Starfall
Tyrande.description: Deal 92 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.

Tyrande.name: Hunter's Mark
Tyrande.description: Reveal a non-Structure enemy and reduce their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds.  Passive: Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal her for 1% of her maximum Health, doubled against targets with Hunter's Mark.

1.name: Ranger
1.description: Sentinel width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.

1.name: Moonlit Arrows
1.description: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.5 seconds.

1.name: Trueshot Aura
1.description: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.

4.name: Everlasting Light
4.description: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.

4.name: Mark of Mending
4.description: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.

4.name: Elune's Chosen
4.description: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.

7.name: Elune's Gift
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Lunar Flare grants 20% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

7.name: Kaldorei Resistance
7.description: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.

7.name: Huntress' Fury
7.description: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce to nearby enemy Heroes.  Passive: Increase Hunter's Mark duration by 1 second, and its cast range by 25%.

10.name: Shadowstalk
10.description: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

10.name: Starfall
10.description: Deal 92 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.

13.name: Quickening Blessing
13.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Harsh Moonlight
13.description: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Ranger's Mark
13.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.

16.name: Celestial Attunement
16.description: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.

16.name: Empower
16.description: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.

16.name: Darnassian Archery
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.

20.name: Eyes of the Huntress
20.description: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 100% more.

20.name: Celestial Wrath
20.description: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.

20.name: Iceblade Arrows
20.description: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

tooltipMarkup.ElunesFury: Hitting an enemy Hero with Lunar Flare grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeSpellPowerBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeSpellPowerBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeDarnassianArchery: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TyrandeDarnassianArcheryTalentDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> increased Attack Damage bonus for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeDarnassianArcheryDamageBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeElunesChosen: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c> of the damage dealt. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeElunesChosenAllyBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeEyesOfTheHuntress: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeShadowstalkEyesOfTheHuntressTalentRevealer,Duration"/></c> seconds and heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyrandeShadowstalkCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EyesOfTheHuntress].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeHarshMoonlight: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TyrandeSentinelHarshMoonlightTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and reduces their damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TyrandeSentinelHarshMoonlightTalentDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeSentinelHarshMoonlightTalentDamageReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeHuntersMark: Reveal a non-Structure enemy and reduce their Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeHuntersMarkArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeHuntersMarkArmorDecrease,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal her for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Effect,TyrandeHuntersMarkNormalHeal,RechargeVitalFraction)"Precision="2"/>%</c> of her maximum Health, doubled against targets with Hunter's Mark.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeHuntersMarkHuntressFuryTalent: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce to nearby enemy Heroes.</n></n><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Hunter's Mark duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,TyrandeHuntressFury,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> second, and its cast range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TyrandeHuntressFury,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,TyrandeHuntersMark,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeHuntersMarkMarkOfMendingTalent: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TyrandeHuntersMarkMarkOfMendingMarkedHeal,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeHuntersMarkRangersMarkTalent: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyrandeHuntersMarkRangersMarkTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyrandeHuntersMarkRangersMarkTalentModifyLunarFlareCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeIcebladeArrows: Increase Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyrandeIcebladeArrowsAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Accumulator,TyrandeIcebladeArrowsDebuffAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeIcebladeArrowsDuration,Duration"/></c> seconds. This effect stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeIcebladeArrowsTalentTokenCounter,Max"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeKaldoreiResistance: Light of Elune grants the target <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeLightofEluneKaldoreiResistanceTalentArmorStack,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeLightofEluneKaldoreiResistanceTalentArmorStack,Duration"/></c> seconds. This effect stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeLightofEluneKaldoreiResistanceTalentArmorStack,MaxStackCount"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeLightOfElune: Heal an ally Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,LightofEluneHealTarget,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>. Light of Elune's cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyrandeLightofEluneModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"precision="2"/></c> seconds every time Tyrande hits an enemy with a Basic Attack or damages an enemy Hero.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TyrandeLightofElune,Cost[0].Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges. Cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeLightOfEluneCelestialAttunementTa: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeLightOfEluneEverlastingLight: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,LightofEluneHealTarget,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EverlastingLight].Modifier"/>%</c> more.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeLightOfEluneQuickeningBlessingTal: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyrandeLightOfEluneQuickeningBlessingSelfMovespeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeLightofEluneQuickeningBlessingMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyrandeLightofEluneQuickeningBlessingMoveSpeedBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeLunarFlare: After seconds, deal damage and Stun enemies in the target area for seconds. Restores 25 Mana per enemy hit.Quest: Hitting a Hero with Lunar Flare increases its damage by %, up to %. Double this bonus if the Hero dies within 3 seconds.Reward: After hitting 10 Heroes, increase Lunar Flare's range by %.Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Sentinel now pierces the first Hero hit.Mythic Reward: After hitting Heroes, Every th Basic Attacks fires a Lunar Flare, prioritizing Heroes. Attack Range increased by 1.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeMoonlitArrows: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyrandeLightofEluneMoonlitArrowsTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse-1.5"precision="2"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeSentinel: Send an Owl across the battleground revealing its path, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SentinelShotDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first Hero hit, and revealing them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SentinelShotRevealerPersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="1"/> </c>seconds. If a Hero revealed by Sentinel dies, refresh its cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeSentinelEmpowerTalent: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,TyrandeEmpower,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TyrandeSentinelShotEmpowerDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeSentinelRangerTalent: Sentinel width is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TyrandeRanger,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value-100"/>%</c> and deals up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TyrandeSentinelShotRangerAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> more damage based on distance traveled.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeShadowstalk: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ShadowstalkCloak,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds and heal them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyrandeShadowstalkCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate*Behavior,TyrandeShadowstalkHealBehavior,PeriodCount"/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ShadowstalkCloak,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HeroGenericStationaryExtraStealthCountdown,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeStarfall: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StarfallDamage,Amount + (Effect,StarfallDamage,Amount * Effect,StarfallDamage,AttributeFactor[Heroic])"/></c> damage per second and Slow enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,StarfallSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor[0] * 100" precision="1" player="0"/>%</c> in an area. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StarfallCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0] * [d ref='Effect,StarfallCreatePersistent,PeriodCount' player='0'/]"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyrandeStarfallCelestialWrathTalent: Increase the Slow of Starfall to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Talent,TyrandeMasteryStarfallCelestialWrath,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value+Behavior,StarfallSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)*100" player="0"/>%</c> and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.
